title: tateishia retusa
intro: Tateishia retusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to China and is also known as the 'Tateishia'. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Traditionally, Tateishia retusa is prepared into herbal decoctions or infusions, and it is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and supporting respiratory health.
